logger.doc:name: Log Business/Non Retiable Error
logger.message: Non Retriable Error message: #[error.errorMessage.payload] ---------------- applicationId: #[vars.applicationFormId] is getting pushed to IPE

logger.doc:name: Log Ack
logger.message: #["Message Ack in Queue after processing of the message failed with Business Error. CorrelationId: " ++ vars.correlationId]

logger.doc:name: Log Business / Non Retiable Error
logger.message: Non Retriable Error message: #[error.errorMessage.payload] ---------------- applicationId: #[vars.applicationFormId] is getting pushed to IPE

logger.doc:name: Log Ack
logger.message: #["Message Ack in Queue after processing of the message failed with Business Error. CorrelationId: " ++ vars.correlationId]

logger.doc:name: Log Technical/Retriable Error
logger.message: Retriable Error message: #[error.errorMessage.payload] ---------------- applicationId: #[vars.applicationFormId] is getting retried

logger.doc:name: Log Nack
logger.message: #[output application/java --- "Correlation ID: " ++ vars.correlationId ++ " Application ID is getting retried via queue due to error: " ++ vars.applicationFormId]

logger.doc:name: Log Error Info
logger.message: C5 Retry Exhausted and Message moved to DLQ for applicationId: #[vars.applicationFormId]

ee:transform.doc:name: payload to update SF IPE status

ee:message.ee:set-payload: %dw 2.0 output application/json var fraudCheckFailed = vars.fraudCheckFailed default false var compositeErrors = if(!isEmpty(error.errorMessage.payload.failures)) (((error.errorMessage.payload.failures mapObject ((value, key, index) -> value.errorMessage.payload default {})).*error default [] reduce ((item, accumulator="") -> accumulator ++ item.errorMessage ++ " : " ++ item.errorDescription ++ ", "))[0 to -3]) else "" --- { "uniqueId": if (vars.requestEventType == p('mq.lomapiAgencyData.documentsUpload.event')) vars.originalPayload.entities.uniqueId[0] else vars.originalPayload.data.payload.EU_IntegrationLogId__c, "errorStatus": "Failed", "errorCode": if(fraudCheckFailed) vars.fraudCheckData.errorCode joinBy "," else error.errorMessage.payload.error.errorCode default error.errorType.identifier, "errorMessage": if(fraudCheckFailed) vars.fraudCheckData.errorMessage joinBy "," else if(!isEmpty(compositeErrors)) compositeErrors else ((error.errorMessage.payload.error.errorMessage default "INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR") ++ " : " ++ (error.errorMessage.payload.error.errorDescription default "")), "errorDateTime": if (vars.requestEventType == p('mq.lomapiAgencyData.documentsUpload.event')) vars.originalPayload.entities.createdDate[0] else vars.originalPayload.data.payload.CreatedDate }

http:request.doc:name: update SF IPE status with error

logger.doc:name: Log Error while saving Business Error
logger.message: #[output application/java --- "Pushinig messsage to DLQ after failing to save business error into Salesforce. Correlation ID: " ++ vars.correlationId ++ " Unique Id: " ++ vars.originalPayload.data.payload.EU_IntegrationLogId__c]

anypoint-mq:publish.doc:name: Publish DLQ
anypoint-mq:publish.destination: #[if(vars.originalPayload.data.payload.EU_EventType__c == "LoMaAPI C4") Mule::p('mq.lomapiInbound.dlq') else if(vars.originalPayload.data.payload.EU_EventType__c == Mule::p('mq.fraudCheckInbound.event')) Mule::p('mq.fraudCheckInbound.dlq') else if (vars.originalPayload.data.payload.EU_EventType__c == "C6") Mule::p('mq.lomapiAgencyData.dlq') else if (vars.originalPayload.eventType == "Agency Documents Upload") Mule::p('mq.documentsUpload.dlq') else if (vars.originalPayload.data.payload.EU_EventType__c == Mule::p('mq.lomapiAgencyFeedback.event')) Mule::p('mq.lomapiAgencyFeedback.dlq') else Mule::p('mq.exposureInbound.dlq')]
